scripts.build:ordered: bun run --filter 'agent-scope' build && bun run --filter 'cli-kit' build && bun run --filter 'spaces-config' build && bun run --filter 'spaces-runtime' build && bun run --filter 'spaces-harness-claude' build && bun run --filter 'spaces-harness-codex' build && bun run --filter 'spaces-harness-pi' build && bun run --filter 'spaces-harness-pi-sdk' build && bun run --filter 'spaces-execution' build && bun run --filter 'spaces-harness-broker-protocol' build && bun run --filter 'agent-spaces' build && bun run --filter '@lherron/agent-spaces' build
scripts.test: bash -lc 'for pkg in "agent-scope" "cli-kit" "spaces-config" "spaces-runtime" "spaces-harness-claude" "spaces-harness-codex" "spaces-harness-pi" "spaces-harness-pi-sdk" "spaces-execution" "spaces-harness-broker-protocol" "agent-spaces" "@lherron/agent-spaces"; do bun run --filter "$pkg" test || exit $?; done'
scripts.rebuild: bun run clean && bun run build
